title: elaeocarpus millarii
intro: Elaeocarpus millarii, also known as the Blue Olive or Blue Olive Tree, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Elaeocarpus genus. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus millarii include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory discomfort, and supporting the immune system. Elaeocarpus millarii is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in traditional remedies, where it is steeped in hot water to release its active compounds and provide relief from various health conditions.
